problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: If CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
